## Series B and Beyond

**Published by**

December 13, 2016

![](https://iterable.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/Allthechannels-1.png)

As 2016 comes to a close, it’s a popular time to reflect on the year’s accomplishments, learn from its challenges and set sights on the plan ahead. For us at Iterable, we have a great reason to celebrate this holiday season: we’re excited to announce our Series B! We’ve [raised $23M](https://venturebeat.com/2016/12/13/iterable-raises-23-million-to-help-companies-like-yelp-and-zillow-reach-users/) [from Index Ventures](https://www.wsj.com/articles/email-marketing-tool-iterable-raises-23-million-series-b-1481578998), CRV and other previous investors!

As a team dedicated to accomplishing our vision of building the best CRM and messaging platform for high-growth consumer companies, we’re proud to see exponential growth of our own. It’s been less than one year since we raised our [Series A financing](https://iterable.com/blog/the-next-iteration), and since then, our recurring revenue has grown by over 400 percent.

With this ramp-up comes even greater focus on delivering an enterprise-grade platform with innovative tools for today’s growth marketer. To enhance our powerful email and mobile capabilities, we’re also announcing new in-app messaging features to power real-time user engagement (reach out to our [Customer Success team](mailto:support@deviterable.wpengine.com) for access!). This functionality fits seamlessly with the rest of the Iterable platform, allowing our customers to grow and retain their consumer audiences.

Less than four years after our company’s founding, we now help customers like Zillow reach and engage hundreds of millions of users around the world. This round of funding will enable support for more marketing channels and increased investment in our customers’ success.

Needless to say, we’re hiring quickly, yet thoughtfully, to scale our engineering, sales and marketing efforts. If you want to be part of an amazing team and empower the next generation of marketers, check out our [open positions](https://iterable.com/careers). Join us, and let’s make 2017 even more spectacular than 2016!

Justin
